summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Settings, SEO, Content Management, and Partner Profile APIs. All 30 backend tests passed. Frontend admin pages are accessible and functional. Fixed a backend bug in SEO pages endpoint.

minor.issue: Type hint was Dict[str, Any] but code expected list - FIXED by using Request.json()

critical_code_review_comments: Backend SEO endpoint fixed to accept both list and dict for pages section
All admin settings (general, branding, social, features, homepage) save and load correctly
All SEO settings (global, pages, robots, structured_data) save and load correctly
All content management (homepage, about, contact, faq, footer) with multi-language support working
Partner profile ethnicity and skin_tone fields are properly saved and retrieved
seed_data_creation: Test partner profile created with ethnicity='caucasian' and skin_tone='medium'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features tested and working: 1) Admin Site Settings with 5 tabs (General, Branding, Social, Features, Homepage) - all save/load correctly. 2) Admin SEO with 4 tabs (Global SEO, Page SEO, Robots, Analytics) - all save/load correctly. 3) Admin Content Management with 5 pages (Homepage, About, Contact, FAQ, Footer) and 5 languages (TR, EN, RU, DE, EL) - all save/load correctly. 4) Partner Profile ethnicity and skin_tone fields added and working. Backend bug in /api/admin/seo/pages was fixed (changed type hint to use Request.json() to accept both list and dict).

admin_site_settings.general_settings: PASS - site_name, tagline, description, contact info, regional settings, site status
admin_site_settings.features_settings: PASS - messaging, favorites, reviews, booking, payment, sms/email notifications
admin_site_settings.homepage_settings: PASS - hero texts, section toggles, partners_per_section

admin_seo.global_seo: PASS - site_title, description, keywords, og_image, twitter_handle, analytics IDs
admin_seo.pages_seo: PASS - per-page title, description, keywords, og customization
admin_seo.structured_data: PASS - organization name, type, logo, url, contact_type

admin_content.homepage_content: PASS - hero_title, subtitle, description, CTAs, section titles (TR/EN)
admin_content.about_content: PASS - title, subtitle, content, mission, vision (TR/EN)
admin_content.contact_content: PASS - title, subtitle, description, form labels (TR)
admin_content.faq_content: PASS - title, subtitle, FAQ items with question/answer (TR)

bug_fix_applied.issue: Type hint Dict[str, Any] prevented accepting list for pages section
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed to use Request.json() to accept any JSON body type
